channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Code Your Worth
item.description: Unlock your earning potential! Discover expert tips on salary negotiation for tech roles in our 'Code Your Worth' blog post. Boost your confidence and income today!

item.title: Twin Vision
item.description: Unlock the power of Digital Twin Technology with Twin Vision. Discover its impact on industries and innovation.

item.title: Mastering Application Security: SAST vs. DAST Explained
item.description: Learn the difference between SAST & DAST in app security testing.

item.title: Secure Your App...
item.description: Discover essential tips for mobile app security! Learn how to protect your app from threats and ensure user data safety with our expert guide.

item.title: SvelteJS
item.description: Discover SvelteJS: Build fast, scalable apps with modern JavaScript

item.title: Data Harmony
item.description: Learn database design & normalization best practices for efficient data management.

item.title: Crypto Unlocked
item.description: Unlock the world of crypto & blockchain. Discover trends, insights, and innovations shaping the future of finance.

item.title: Boost Your Mobile App: Essential Performance Optimization Tips (...)
item.description: Boost your mobile app's speed & efficiency with expert performance optimization tips.

item.title: Design to Impress
item.description: Master your system design interview with expert tips in 'Design to Impress.' Boost your confidence and ace your next tech interview!

item.title: RPA Boost (...)
item.description: Unlock efficiency with RPA. Discover how robotics process automation boosts productivity.

item.title: Forecast Future
item.description: Unlock future insights with AI-driven time series forecasting. Learn how to predict trends and make data-driven decisions.

item.title: Query Smarter
item.description: Optimize database queries for faster performance and improved efficiency. Learn expert tips and tricks.

item.title: DevOps Done Right (04/26)
item.description: Unlock DevOps success with expert best practices and cultural tips.

item.title: AI Wordsmiths
item.description: Unlock AI's writing potential with Generative AI & Large Language Models.

item.title: Boost Insights: DW Solutions
item.description: Unlock data insights with expert DW solutions, boosting business intelligence and growth.

item.title: Automate Mobile
item.description: Streamline mobile app development with CI/CD automation. Learn how to save time & boost efficiency.

item.title: Mesh Up Data (April 2026)
item.description: Unlock data's full potential with Data Mesh Architecture, a decentralized approach to data management.

item.title: Auth Done (April 2026)
item.description: Master OAuth 2.0 & OpenID Connect in our April 2026 update

item.title: AI Talks
item.description: Explore the future of AI with Generative AI & Large Language Models.

item.title: Tap to Impress
item.description: Elevate your mobile app with expert UI/UX tips and best practices.
